stemHtml: The privileges of a holder of an MCC (Multi-Crew Cooperation) certificate are...

options.a: to act as a pilot-in-command of an aircraft requiring a co-pilot.
options.b: to act as a co-pilot of an aircraft requiring a copilot.
options.c: to act as both pilot-in-command and co-pilot of an aircraft requiring a copilot.
options.d: not to act in any capacity without an ATPL, CPL or MPL license.
